reasons: Khufra directly punishes Ling's mobility and wall-entry pattern.
Bouncing Ball can interrupt Ling's dive path when Khufra positions near the backline or likely wall routes.

proof.summary: Ling depends on mobility and wall-based entry, while Khufra's Bouncing Ball can knock airborne enemies trying to blink across him.
worksBestWhen: Khufra waits for Ling's real entry instead of using Bouncing Ball early.
Khufra positions near the backline or likely wall entry points.
failureCases: Ling baits Bouncing Ball before committing.
Ling waits until Khufra's anti-dash tool is unavailable.

reasons: Minsitthar's ultimate zone can deny Ling's dash and blink freedom during fights.
Ling becomes much easier to punish when he dives into an area where his mobility is restricted.

proof.summary: Ling needs repeated mobility to enter, reposition, and escape, while Minsitthar's King's Calling disables dash or blink skills in the fight area.
worksBestWhen: Minsitthar places the zone where Ling must pass through to reach carries.
The team focuses Ling while he is trapped in the anti-dash area.
failureCases: Ling waits outside the zone and re-enters later.
Minsitthar misses the timing and uses ultimate after Ling has already escaped.

reasons: Franco can lock Ling with suppression when Ling lands or overcommits.
Suppression is valuable because Ling can dodge many ordinary skillshots with mobility and ultimate timing.

proof.summary: Ling wants to evade normal control with mobility, while Franco's targeted suppression can hold him in place for burst follow-up during a targetable window.
worksBestWhen: Franco waits until Ling is targetable and no longer invulnerable.
Franco's team is ready to burst during Bloody Hunt.
failureCases: Franco uses suppression into Ling's untargetable or ultimate timing.
Ling stays out of Franco's range and forces Franco to waste hook.

reasons: Obsidia can punish Ling after landing Hunt of Bone because the tethered target cannot use displacement skills during the effect.
Ling depends heavily on wall movement and repositioning, so a successful tether can force him into a shorter and more punishable fight.

proof.summary: Ling wants to escape or reposition through wall mobility, while Obsidia's Hunt of Bone can tether him and prevent displacement skills during the tether window.
worksBestWhen: Obsidia casts ultimate after Ling commits or after Ling has limited escape options.
Obsidia or her team has enough follow-up damage during the tether.
failureCases: Ling uses Tempest of Blades or invulnerability timing before Obsidia can lock him.
Obsidia is caught first before she can safely cast.

reasons: Saber can punish Ling when Ling lands from wall movement or commits onto the backline.
Triple Sweep gives Saber a targeted airborne burst window, which is useful because Ling is hard to catch with normal skillshots.

proof.summary: Ling wants to enter fights quickly, burst a target, then escape with mobility or Tempest of Blades. Saber can punish Ling during a targetable window by locking him airborne with Triple Sweep and bursting him before he resets.
worksBestWhen: Saber waits until Ling lands or commits onto a target.
Saber avoids casting into Ling's Tempest of Blades invincibility.
Saber has enough burst damage to finish Ling during the airborne combo.
failureCases: Ling baits Saber ultimate with Tempest of Blades.
Saber cannot reach Ling because Ling stays on walls or plays outside vision.
Saber lacks burst and Ling survives long enough to escape.
